Package com.dua3.utility.fx.controls

Class ListInputControl<C extends javafx.scene.control.Control,S>

java.lang.Object
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.SimpleInputControl<C,javafx.collections.ObservableList<S>>
com.dua3.utility.fx.controls.ListInputControl<C,S>
Type Parameters:
C - the type of the control
S - the type of elements in the list
All Implemented Interfaces:
InputControl<javafx.collections.ObservableList<S>>
public final class ListInputControl<C extends javafx.scene.control.Control,S> extends SimpleInputControl<C,javafx.collections.ObservableList<S>>
SimpleInputControl for list-based input controls.

  • Constructor Details

    • ListInputControl

      public ListInputControl(C control, javafx.beans.property.ListProperty<S> value, Supplier<? extends Collection<S>> dflt, Function<List<S>,Optional<String>> validate)
      Constructs a ListInputControl instance used for managing list-based inputs.
      Parameters:
      control - the underlying GUI control associated with this input control
      value - the property representing the list of values to bind to this control
      dflt - a supplier providing the default list of values for this control
      validate - a function used to validate the list of values and optionally return an error message
